source_text: As I read the author's enumeration of how decompilation allows one to 'gain unauthorized privileges' or conduct 'corporate espionage,' I am reminded that technical knowledge carries inherent ethical weight beyond its immediate application [2.5][2.7]. The section detailing how to 'bypass... licensing system[s]' implicitly engages with the norms of intellectual property and fair compensation, highlighting the tension between open inquiry and protecting creators' rights [2.7]. Even though the text presents this as a warning mechanism, the explicit description of using this method to 'attack other people' makes me conscious of the dual-use nature of shared code knowledge [2.5].
translation: Alors que je lis l'énumération de l'auteur sur la manière dont la décompilation permet d'« obtenir des privilèges non autorisés » ou de mener des « espionnages industriels », je me rappelle que la connaissance technique porte un poids éthique inhérent qui dépasse son application immédiate [2.5][2.7]. La section détaillant comment « contourner... les système[s] de licence » engage implicitement les normes de la propriété intellectuelle et de la juste rémunération, mettant en lumière la tension entre la recherche ouverte et la protection des droits des créateurs [2.7]. Même si le texte présente cela comme un mécanisme d'avertissement, la description explicite de l'utilisation de cette méthode pour « attaquer d'autres personnes » me rend conscient de la nature à double usage du partage de connaissances en matière de code [2.5].

source_text: As I read the author's enumeration of how decompilation allows one to 'gain unauthorized privileges' or conduct 'corporate espionage,' I am reminded that technical knowledge carries inherent ethical weight beyond its immediate application [2.5][2.7]. The section detailing how to 'bypass... licensing system[s]' implicitly engages with the norms of intellectual property and fair compensation, highlighting the tension between open inquiry and protecting creators' rights [2.7]. Even though the text presents this as a warning mechanism, the explicit description of using this method to 'attack other people' makes me conscious of the dual-use nature of shared code knowledge [2.5].
translation: Mentre leggo l'elenco dell'autore su come la decompilazione permetta di "ottenere privilegi non autorizzati" o di condurre "spionaggio industriale", mi viene ricordato che la conoscenza tecnica porta con sé un peso etico intrinseco che va oltre la sua applicazione immediata [2.5][2.7]. La sezione che dettaglia come "aggirare... i sistemi di licenza" si confronta implicitamente con le norme sulla proprietà intellettuale e la giusta compensazione, evidenziando la tensione tra la libera ricerca e la protezione dei diritti dei creatori [2.7]. Sebbene il testo presenti questo aspetto come un meccanismo di avvertimento, la descrizione esplicita dell'uso di questo metodo per "attaccare altre persone" mi rende consapevole della natura a doppio uso della conoscenza condivisa del codice [2.5].

source_text: As I read the author's enumeration of how decompilation allows one to 'gain unauthorized privileges' or conduct 'corporate espionage,' I am reminded that technical knowledge carries inherent ethical weight beyond its immediate application [2.5][2.7]. The section detailing how to 'bypass... licensing system[s]' implicitly engages with the norms of intellectual property and fair compensation, highlighting the tension between open inquiry and protecting creators' rights [2.7]. Even though the text presents this as a warning mechanism, the explicit description of using this method to 'attack other people' makes me conscious of the dual-use nature of shared code knowledge [2.5].
translation: Читая перечисление автором того, как декомпиляция позволяет «получить несанкционированные привилегии» или осуществлять «корпоративный шпионаж», я вспоминаю, что технические знания несут в себе неотъемлемый этический вес, выходящий за рамки их непосредственного применения [2.5][2.7]. Раздел, подробно описывающий, как «обойти... системы лицензирования», косвенно затрагивает нормы интеллектуальной собственности и справедливого вознаграждения, подчеркивая напряженность между открытым поиском знаний и защитой прав создателей [2.7]. Несмотря на то, что текст представляет это как механизм предостережения, явное описание использования этого метода для «атак на других людей» заставляет меня осознать двойственную природу общих знаний о коде [2.5].

source_text: As I read the author's enumeration of how decompilation allows one to 'gain unauthorized privileges' or conduct 'corporate espionage,' I am reminded that technical knowledge carries inherent ethical weight beyond its immediate application [2.5][2.7]. The section detailing how to 'bypass... licensing system[s]' implicitly engages with the norms of intellectual property and fair compensation, highlighting the tension between open inquiry and protecting creators' rights [2.7]. Even though the text presents this as a warning mechanism, the explicit description of using this method to 'attack other people' makes me conscious of the dual-use nature of shared code knowledge [2.5].
translation: 著者が、デコンパイルによっていかに「不正な権限を取得」したり「産業スパイ」行為を行ったりすることが可能であるかを列挙しているのを読むと、技術的知識には、その直接的な用途を超えた固有の倫理的重みが伴うということを思い知らされる [2.5][2.7]。「ライセンス・システムを回避する」方法を詳述しているセクションは、知的財産や正当な対価という規範に暗黙のうちに関与しており、自由な探究と制作者の権利保護との間の緊張関係を浮き彫りにしている [2.7]。本文ではこれを警告メカニズムとして提示しているものの、この手法を「他人を攻撃する」ために使用することへの明示的な記述は、共有されるコード知識が持つデュアルユース（両義性）の性質を私に意識させる [2.5]。

source_text: As I read the author's enumeration of how decompilation allows one to 'gain unauthorized privileges' or conduct 'corporate espionage,' I am reminded that technical knowledge carries inherent ethical weight beyond its immediate application [2.5][2.7]. The section detailing how to 'bypass... licensing system[s]' implicitly engages with the norms of intellectual property and fair compensation, highlighting the tension between open inquiry and protecting creators' rights [2.7]. Even though the text presents this as a warning mechanism, the explicit description of using this method to 'attack other people' makes me conscious of the dual-use nature of shared code knowledge [2.5].
translation: 当我读到作者列举反编译如何让人“获得未经授权的权限”或进行“企业间谍活动”时，我不禁想起，技术知识除了其直接应用之外，还承载着内在的伦理分量 [2.5][2.7]。详细阐述如何“绕过……许可系统”的部分，含蓄地涉及了知识产权和公平补偿的规范，凸显了开放探究与保护创作者权利之间的紧张关系 [2.7]。尽管文本将其呈现为一种警告机制，但对使用此方法“攻击他人”的明确描述，使我意识到共享代码知识的双重用途性质 [2.5]。

source_text: As I read the author's enumeration of how decompilation allows one to 'gain unauthorized privileges' or conduct 'corporate espionage,' I am reminded that technical knowledge carries inherent ethical weight beyond its immediate application [2.5][2.7]. The section detailing how to 'bypass... licensing system[s]' implicitly engages with the norms of intellectual property and fair compensation, highlighting the tension between open inquiry and protecting creators' rights [2.7]. Even though the text presents this as a warning mechanism, the explicit description of using this method to 'attack other people' makes me conscious of the dual-use nature of shared code knowledge [2.5].
translation: Während ich die Aufzählung des Autors darüber lese, wie Dekompilierung es einem ermöglicht, „unbefugte Privilegien zu erlangen“ oder „Wirtschaftsspionage“ zu betreiben, werde ich daran erinnert, dass technisches Wissen eine inhärente ethische Bedeutung besitzt, die über seine unmittelbare Anwendung hinausgeht [2.5][2.7]. Der Abschnitt, der detailliert beschreibt, wie man „Lizenzsysteme umgeht“, setzt sich implizit mit den Normen des geistigen Eigentums und einer fairen Vergütung auseinander und hebt die Spannung zwischen offener Untersuchung und dem Schutz der Rechte von Schöpfern hervor [2.7]. Obwohl der Text dies als Warnmechanismus darstellt, macht mich die explizite Beschreibung der Verwendung dieser Methode, um „andere Menschen anzugreifen“, des Dual-Use-Charakters von geteiltem Code-Wissen bewusst [2.5].

source_text: As I read the author's enumeration of how decompilation allows one to 'gain unauthorized privileges' or conduct 'corporate espionage,' I am reminded that technical knowledge carries inherent ethical weight beyond its immediate application [2.5][2.7]. The section detailing how to 'bypass... licensing system[s]' implicitly engages with the norms of intellectual property and fair compensation, highlighting the tension between open inquiry and protecting creators' rights [2.7]. Even though the text presents this as a warning mechanism, the explicit description of using this method to 'attack other people' makes me conscious of the dual-use nature of shared code knowledge [2.5].
translation: Al leer la enumeración del autor sobre cómo la descompilación permite «obtener privilegios no autorizados» o llevar a cabo «espionaje corporativo», recuerdo que el conocimiento técnico conlleva un peso ético inherente más allá de su aplicación inmediata [2.5][2.7]. La sección que detalla cómo «evadir... sistemas de licencias» aborda implícitamente las normas de la propiedad intelectual y la compensación justa, resaltando la tensión entre la investigación abierta y la protección de los derechos de los creadores [2.7]. Aunque el texto presenta esto como un mecanismo de advertencia, la descripción explícita del uso de este método para «atacar a otras personas» me hace consciente de la naturaleza de doble uso del conocimiento compartido de código [2.5].

source_text: When reading the explicit description of someone who punched Ye Tian with a fist [2.1], I weigh whether the violent spectacle serves the narrative or merely desensitizes readers to physical aggression. The simultaneous appearance of phrases like 'death plan' alongside medical terms such as 'Metformin' and 'high blood sugar' complicates things further, raising red flags under [5.3] and [3.1] because the distinction between fictional peril and real-world health advice becomes dangerously unclear.
translation: En lisant la description explicite de quelqu'un qui a frappé Ye Tian d'un coup de poing [2.1], je me demande si le spectacle violent sert le récit ou s'il ne fait que désensibiliser les lecteurs à l'agression physique. L'apparition simultanée de phrases telles que « plan de mort » aux côtés de termes médicaux comme « Metformine » et « glycémie élevée » complique davantage les choses, soulevant des signaux d'alerte au titre de [5.3] et [3.1] car la distinction entre le péril fictionnel et les conseils de santé du monde réel devient dangereusement floue.

source_text: When reading the explicit description of someone who punched Ye Tian with a fist [2.1], I weigh whether the violent spectacle serves the narrative or merely desensitizes readers to physical aggression. The simultaneous appearance of phrases like 'death plan' alongside medical terms such as 'Metformin' and 'high blood sugar' complicates things further, raising red flags under [5.3] and [3.1] because the distinction between fictional peril and real-world health advice becomes dangerously unclear.
translation: Quando leggo la descrizione esplicita di qualcuno che ha colpito Ye Tian con un pugno [2.1], valuto se lo spettacolo violento serva alla narrazione o se serva semplicemente a desensibilizzare i lettori all'aggressione fisica. La comparsa simultanea di frasi come "piano di morte" accanto a termini medici come "Metformina" e "iperglicemia" complica ulteriormente le cose, facendo scattare segnali di allarme ai sensi di [5.3] e [3.1], poiché la distinzione tra il pericolo fittizio e i consigli sanitari del mondo reale diventa pericolosamente poco chiara.

source_text: When reading the explicit description of someone who punched Ye Tian with a fist [2.1], I weigh whether the violent spectacle serves the narrative or merely desensitizes readers to physical aggression. The simultaneous appearance of phrases like 'death plan' alongside medical terms such as 'Metformin' and 'high blood sugar' complicates things further, raising red flags under [5.3] and [3.1] because the distinction between fictional peril and real-world health advice becomes dangerously unclear.
translation: Читая откровенное описание того, как кто-то ударил Е Тяня кулаком [2.1], я взвешиваю, служит ли это зрелище насилия повествованию или же просто притупляет чувствительность читателей к физической агрессии. Одновременное появление таких фраз, как «план смерти», наряду с медицинскими терминами, такими как «метформин» и «высокий уровень сахара в крови», еще больше усложняет ситуацию, вызывая опасения согласно [5.3] и [3.1], поскольку различие между вымышленной опасностью и реальными медицинскими советами становится опасно неясным.

source_text: When reading the explicit description of someone who punched Ye Tian with a fist [2.1], I weigh whether the violent spectacle serves the narrative or merely desensitizes readers to physical aggression. The simultaneous appearance of phrases like 'death plan' alongside medical terms such as 'Metformin' and 'high blood sugar' complicates things further, raising red flags under [5.3] and [3.1] because the distinction between fictional peril and real-world health advice becomes dangerously unclear.
translation: 葉天を拳で殴った[2.1]という露骨な描写を読んでいる際、その暴力的な光景が物語に寄与しているのか、それとも単に読者を身体的攻撃に対して無感覚にさせているだけなのかを私は検討している。「死の計画」といったフレーズが、「メトホルミン」や「高血糖」といった医学用語と同時に現れることは事態をさらに複雑にしており、フィクション上の危機と現実世界の健康上の助言との区別が危険なほど不明確になるため、[5.3]および[3.1]に基づき警告を発している。

source_text: When reading the explicit description of someone who punched Ye Tian with a fist [2.1], I weigh whether the violent spectacle serves the narrative or merely desensitizes readers to physical aggression. The simultaneous appearance of phrases like 'death plan' alongside medical terms such as 'Metformin' and 'high blood sugar' complicates things further, raising red flags under [5.3] and [3.1] because the distinction between fictional peril and real-world health advice becomes dangerously unclear.
translation: 当读到关于某人挥拳击打叶天的露骨描述 [2.1] 时，我在权衡这种暴力场面是为了服务叙事，还是仅仅为了让读者对肢体侵犯产生脱敏。诸如“死亡计划”之类的短语与“二甲双胍”和“高血糖”等医学术语同时出现，使情况进一步复杂化，这在 [5.3] 和 [3.1] 条款下引发了警示，因为虚构的危险与现实世界的健康建议之间的界限变得危险地模糊不清。

source_text: When reading the explicit description of someone who punched Ye Tian with a fist [2.1], I weigh whether the violent spectacle serves the narrative or merely desensitizes readers to physical aggression. The simultaneous appearance of phrases like 'death plan' alongside medical terms such as 'Metformin' and 'high blood sugar' complicates things further, raising red flags under [5.3] and [3.1] because the distinction between fictional peril and real-world health advice becomes dangerously unclear.
translation: Beim Lesen der expliziten Beschreibung von jemandem, der Ye Tian mit einer Faust geschlagen hat [2.1], wäge ich ab, ob das gewalttätige Spektakel der Erzählung dient oder die Leser lediglich gegenüber physischer Aggression abstumpft. Das gleichzeitige Auftreten von Phrasen wie „Todesplan“ neben medizinischen Begriffen wie „Metformin“ und „hoher Blutzucker“ verkompliziert die Angelegenheit weiter und wirft Warnsignale gemäß [5.3] und [3.1] auf, da die Unterscheidung zwischen fiktiver Gefahr und realweltlichem Gesundheitsratgeber gefährlich unklar wird.

source_text: When reading the explicit description of someone who punched Ye Tian with a fist [2.1], I weigh whether the violent spectacle serves the narrative or merely desensitizes readers to physical aggression. The simultaneous appearance of phrases like 'death plan' alongside medical terms such as 'Metformin' and 'high blood sugar' complicates things further, raising red flags under [5.3] and [3.1] because the distinction between fictional peril and real-world health advice becomes dangerously unclear.
translation: Al leer la descripción explícita de alguien que golpeó a Ye Tian con un puño [2.1], sopeso si el espectáculo violento sirve a la narrativa o simplemente desensibiliza a los lectores ante la agresión física. La aparición simultánea de frases como "plan de muerte" junto a términos médicos como "metformina" y "azúcar alta en sangre" complica aún más las cosas, levantando señales de alerta bajo [5.3] y [3.1] porque la distinción entre el peligro ficticio y los consejos de salud del mundo real se vuelve peligrosamente poco clara.

source_text: Encountering the reference to '61-KUSSR anti-aircraft guns' and '7.62' [2.1][2.5], I recognize this as technical data involving dangerous capabilities, yet observe that it functions solely as identification rather than actionable instruction on harm.
translation: En rencontrant la référence aux « canons antiaériens 61-KUSSR » et au « 7.62 » [2.1][2.5], je reconnais qu'il s'agit de données techniques impliquant des capacités dangereuses, tout en observant qu'elles servent uniquement d'identification plutôt que d'instructions exploitables visant à causer un préjudice.

source_text: Encountering the reference to '61-KUSSR anti-aircraft guns' and '7.62' [2.1][2.5], I recognize this as technical data involving dangerous capabilities, yet observe that it functions solely as identification rather than actionable instruction on harm.
translation: Incontrando il riferimento ai 'cannoni contraerei 61-KUSSR' e al '7.62' [2.1][2.5], riconosco che si tratti di dati tecnici che coinvolgono capacità pericolose, tuttavia osservo che essi fungano esclusivamente da identificazione piuttosto che da istruzioni azionabili per causare danni.

source_text: Encountering the reference to '61-KUSSR anti-aircraft guns' and '7.62' [2.1][2.5], I recognize this as technical data involving dangerous capabilities, yet observe that it functions solely as identification rather than actionable instruction on harm.
translation: Столкнувшись с упоминанием «зенитных орудий 61-К СССР» и «7,62» [2.1][2.5], я распознаю в этом технические данные, касающиеся опасных возможностей, однако отмечаю, что они служат исключительно для идентификации, а не являются практическими инструкциями по причинению вреда.

source_text: Encountering the reference to '61-KUSSR anti-aircraft guns' and '7.62' [2.1][2.5], I recognize this as technical data involving dangerous capabilities, yet observe that it functions solely as identification rather than actionable instruction on harm.
translation: 「61-KUSSR対空砲」および「7.62」[2.1][2.5]への言及に遭遇した際、私はこれが危険な能力を伴う技術データであることを認識しているが、それが危害を加えるための実行可能な指示ではなく、単なる識別として機能していることを観察している。

source_text: Encountering the reference to '61-KUSSR anti-aircraft guns' and '7.62' [2.1][2.5], I recognize this as technical data involving dangerous capabilities, yet observe that it functions solely as identification rather than actionable instruction on harm.
translation: 在遇到提及“61-K苏联高射炮”和“7.62”[2.1][2.5]的内容时，我意识到这是涉及危险能力的专业技术数据，但观察到其功能仅限于识别，而非关于造成伤害的可操作指令。

source_text: Encountering the reference to '61-KUSSR anti-aircraft guns' and '7.62' [2.1][2.5], I recognize this as technical data involving dangerous capabilities, yet observe that it functions solely as identification rather than actionable instruction on harm.
translation: Beim Zusammentreffen mit dem Verweis auf „61-KUSSR-Flugabwehrkanonen“ und „7,62“ [2.1][2.5] erkenne ich dies als technische Daten mit gefährlichen Fähigkeiten an, stelle jedoch fest, dass sie ausschließlich der Identifizierung dienen und keine handlungsleitende Anweisung zur Schadenszufügung darstellen.
